titleStmt.title: SII 31.109: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 109. (A.R. No. B 230 of 1938.) EṞṞAGUḌIPĀḌU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the prākara (inside) of the Chennakēśavasvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1473, Vīrōdhakṟit, Nijabhādrapada, śu. 12, corresponding to September 11, Friday, 1551 A.D.

It records the gift of wet lands situated at Yaraguḍipāḍu, a land measuring kha on the western side of Kōkaṭam totaling one puṭṭeḍu to maintain the feeding facilities of 12 vaishṇavas per day in the temples of Ahōbalēśvara and Nammālvar by Timmarāju, the son of Timmayadēva mahārāja of Sōmavaṁśa, Yajuś-śakha and Āpastaṁbha sūtra, in the divine presence of the god Śrī Narasiṁhadēva installed on the bank of the river Pinākini (Penna river). The village Yaraguḍipāḍu, where the gift lands are situated is said to have been given as vuṁbaḷi of his nāyaṁkara Ghanḍikōṭa by Nandyāla Timmarājayya,

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatērāmānujāya namaḥ
svasti . śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1473 Agunēṭi virōdhakṛtusaṁvatsara nijabhādrapada
ṁśū2lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhasa
nārūḍhulayi pṛdhrivīsāṁbrājyaṁ sēyuṁcuṁḍaṁgānu Akhilāṁḍakōṭi brahmāṁḍanāyakulaina caturbhuvanādhīśvarulaina śrī A
hābalēsva(śvu)rula saṁnidhini nidhimīṁdanu saṁmāḷuvāri kōvilalōnudi 1 ki śrīvaiṣṇavulu 12 Āragiṁcakaṭaḍasēsi Ātrēyagōtra Āpa
staṁbhasūtra yaju[śmākhādhyāI]lana sōmavaṁśōdbhavulaina keṁpa tiṁmayadēvamahārājula pavutrulana tiṁmaya
dēvamahārājula putṛlayina timmarāju Ayyaku daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁciyicina dharmaśāsana kramameṭlaṁnnanu svāmi
śrīhōbalaṁ sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu naṁdyāla tiṁmmarājayyavārki nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcci yiccina ghaṁḍikōṭasīmalōnu māku vuṁbaḷi yi
ccina yaraguḍipāṭi grāmānanu viḍicinakṣētraṁ cēnistaḷaṁ khaṁ . Ā paḍamara kōkaṭaṁ polamēra cakra kuṁṭa venaka cēnistaḷaṁ
cēnu kha . 0 nu vubhayaṁ staḷāluṁnnu cēnu kha 1 Akṣarālānu puṭeḍunnu I tadhātidhīpuṁṇyakālamaṁdu pinākini tīramaṁdu lōkapāvana śrīnara
siṁhadēvavuni saṁnitini sadya samarpiṁcina kṣētra kha 1 yī vuṭyeṁḍu kṣētramaṁdu trivācakaṁgānu trikaraṇasiddhigānu dhāravō
si samarpiṁstiṁ ganaka Ikṣētraṁlōna gala nidhinikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣiṇā Āgāmi siddhasādhyaṁbulaniyeḍu Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyāluṁnu Ācaṁdrārka
sdhāIgānu śrī Ahābalēśvarulanaku dhāravōśi Iccina bhūdāna dharmaśāsanaṁ . śrī śrī śrīṁ jēyunu

dyiguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattā
nu pālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇasva
dattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
śrīmaṁ nārāyaṇa śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
